steps.title: Use the reception contrast
steps.content: Although signals a contrast between the films' initial reception and their now more secure critical standing. Since later critics praise the films, the blank should describe earlier people whose reactions would have made that standing less secure.

steps.title: Choose the critic term
steps.content: Choice B means things that came before, Choice C means people who work together, and Choice D means copyists. None names people who criticized the films. The answer is A.
